description: Lightweight cash and pollen flow view: bought, issued, spent, granted, and current balances.

panels.description: Cash collected from paid checkout sessions in the selected range.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  round(sum(amount_cents) / 100.0, 2) AS usd_bought
FROM stripe_event
WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp < $__toTime
  AND event_type IN ('checkout.session.completed', 'checkout.session.async_payment_succeeded')
  AND payment_status = 'paid'
  AND livemode = 1

panels.title: USD Bought

panels.description: Paid pollen credited from purchases, including pack bonuses.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  round(sum(pollen_issued), 2) AS paid_pollen_issued
FROM (
  SELECT
    if(
      metadata_pollen > 0,
      metadata_pollen,
      multiIf(pack_usd = 2, 2, pack_usd = 5, 6, pack_usd = 10, 13, pack_usd = 20, 28, pack_usd = 50, 75, pack_usd = 100, 160, amount_cents / 100.0)
    ) AS pollen_issued
  FROM (
    SELECT
      amount_cents,
      toInt32OrZero(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'metadata', 'packAmount')) AS pack_usd,
      toFloat64OrZero(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'metadata', 'packPollenGrant')) AS metadata_pollen
    FROM stripe_event
    WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp < $__toTime
      AND event_type IN ('checkout.session.completed', 'checkout.session.async_payment_succeeded')
      AND payment_status = 'paid'
      AND livemode = 1
  )
)

panels.title: Paid Issued

panels.description: Paid pollen spent from pack balances in the selected range.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (
  SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username
)
SELECT
  round(sum(total_price), 2) AS paid_pollen_spent
FROM generation_event
WHERE start_time >= $__fromTime AND start_time < $__toTime
  AND environment = 'production'
  AND selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:pack', 'local:pack')
  AND is_billed_usage = true
  AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND total_price > 0
  AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users)
  AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))

panels.title: Paid Spent

panels.description: Free tier pollen spent in the selected range.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (
  SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username
)
SELECT
  round(sum(total_price), 2) AS tier_pollen_spent
FROM generation_event
WHERE start_time >= $__fromTime AND start_time < $__toTime
  AND environment = 'production'
  AND selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:tier', 'local:tier')
  AND is_billed_usage = true
  AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND total_price > 0
  AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users)
  AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))

panels.title: Tier Spent

panels.description: Average cash paid per paid pollen issued after pack bonuses.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  round(if(sum(pollen_issued) > 0, sum(usd_collected) / sum(pollen_issued), 0), 4) AS effective_usd_per_pollen
FROM (
  SELECT
    amount_cents / 100.0 AS usd_collected,
    if(
      metadata_pollen > 0,
      metadata_pollen,
      multiIf(pack_usd = 2, 2, pack_usd = 5, 6, pack_usd = 10, 13, pack_usd = 20, 28, pack_usd = 50, 75, pack_usd = 100, 160, amount_cents / 100.0)
    ) AS pollen_issued
  FROM (
    SELECT
      amount_cents,
      toInt32OrZero(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'metadata', 'packAmount')) AS pack_usd,
      toFloat64OrZero(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'metadata', 'packPollenGrant')) AS metadata_pollen
    FROM stripe_event
    WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp < $__toTime
      AND event_type IN ('checkout.session.completed', 'checkout.session.async_payment_succeeded')
      AND payment_status = 'paid'
      AND livemode = 1
  )
)

panels.title: Sale Price

panels.description: Current unspent paid pollen from the latest D1 snapshot.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  round(sum(coalesce(pack_balance, 0)), 2) AS paid_balance
FROM d1_user
WHERE synced_at = (SELECT max(synced_at) FROM d1_user)
  AND banned = 0

panels.title: Paid Balance

panels.description: Daily pollen spent split by paid pack balance and free tier balance.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (
  SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username
)
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(start_time, INTERVAL 1 DAY) AS time,
  sumIf(total_price, selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:pack', 'local:pack')) AS paid_pollen_spent,
  sumIf(total_price, selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:tier', 'local:tier')) AS tier_pollen_spent,
  if(paid_pollen_spent + tier_pollen_spent > 0, paid_pollen_spent / (paid_pollen_spent + tier_pollen_spent), 0) AS paid_share
FROM generation_event
WHERE start_time >= $__fromTime AND start_time < $__toTime
  AND environment = 'production'
  AND is_billed_usage = true
  AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND total_price > 0
  AND selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:pack', 'local:pack', 'v1:meter:tier', 'local:tier')
  AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users)
  AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Pollen Spent

panels.description: Daily USD collected and paid pollen issued from checkout purchases.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 DAY) AS time,
  round(sum(amount_cents) / 100.0, 2) AS usd_collected,
  round(sum(pollen_issued), 2) AS paid_pollen_issued
FROM (
  SELECT
    timestamp,
    amount_cents,
    if(
      metadata_pollen > 0,
      metadata_pollen,
      multiIf(pack_usd = 2, 2, pack_usd = 5, 6, pack_usd = 10, 13, pack_usd = 20, 28, pack_usd = 50, 75, pack_usd = 100, 160, amount_cents / 100.0)
    ) AS pollen_issued
  FROM (
    SELECT
      timestamp,
      amount_cents,
      toInt32OrZero(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'metadata', 'packAmount')) AS pack_usd,
      toFloat64OrZero(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'metadata', 'packPollenGrant')) AS metadata_pollen
    FROM stripe_event
    WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp < $__toTime
      AND event_type IN ('checkout.session.completed', 'checkout.session.async_payment_succeeded')
      AND payment_status = 'paid'
      AND livemode = 1
  )
)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Credit Bought

panels.description: Daily paid pollen issued from purchases versus paid pollen spent. Ratio omitted because issuance is lumpy.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (
  SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username
)
SELECT
  time,
  round(sum(paid_pollen_issued), 2) AS paid_pollen_issued,
  round(sum(paid_pollen_spent), 2) AS paid_pollen_spent
FROM (
  SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 DAY) AS time,
    sum(pollen_issued) AS paid_pollen_issued,
    0.0 AS paid_pollen_spent
  FROM (
    SELECT
      timestamp,
      if(
        metadata_pollen > 0,
        metadata_pollen,
        multiIf(pack_usd = 2, 2, pack_usd = 5, 6, pack_usd = 10, 13, pack_usd = 20, 28, pack_usd = 50, 75, pack_usd = 100, 160, amount_cents / 100.0)
      ) AS pollen_issued
    FROM (
      SELECT
        timestamp,
        amount_cents,
        toInt32OrZero(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'metadata', 'packAmount')) AS pack_usd,
        toFloat64OrZero(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'metadata', 'packPollenGrant')) AS metadata_pollen
      FROM stripe_event
      WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp < $__toTime
        AND event_type IN ('checkout.session.completed', 'checkout.session.async_payment_succeeded')
        AND payment_status = 'paid'
        AND livemode = 1
    )
  )
  GROUP BY time
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(start_time, INTERVAL 1 DAY) AS time,
    0.0 AS paid_pollen_issued,
    sum(total_price) AS paid_pollen_spent
  FROM generation_event
  WHERE start_time >= $__fromTime AND start_time < $__toTime
    AND environment = 'production'
    AND selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:pack', 'local:pack')
    AND is_billed_usage = true
    AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
    AND total_price > 0
    AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users)
    AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))
  GROUP BY time
)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Paid Sold vs Spent

panels.description: Tier pollen spent valued at the selected-period blended sale price. Directional, not FIFO.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (
  SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username
),
purchases AS (
  SELECT
    sum(usd_collected) AS usd_collected,
    sum(pollen_issued) AS paid_pollen_issued
  FROM (
    SELECT
      amount_cents / 100.0 AS usd_collected,
      if(
        metadata_pollen > 0,
        metadata_pollen,
        multiIf(pack_usd = 2, 2, pack_usd = 5, 6, pack_usd = 10, 13, pack_usd = 20, 28, pack_usd = 50, 75, pack_usd = 100, 160, amount_cents / 100.0)
      ) AS pollen_issued
    FROM (
      SELECT
        amount_cents,
        toInt32OrZero(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'metadata', 'packAmount')) AS pack_usd,
        toFloat64OrZero(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'metadata', 'packPollenGrant')) AS metadata_pollen
      FROM stripe_event
      WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp < $__toTime
        AND event_type IN ('checkout.session.completed', 'checkout.session.async_payment_succeeded')
        AND payment_status = 'paid'
        AND livemode = 1
    )
  )
),
blended_price AS (
  SELECT if(paid_pollen_issued > 0, usd_collected / paid_pollen_issued, 0) AS usd_per_pollen
  FROM purchases
)
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(start_time, INTERVAL 1 DAY) AS time,
  round(sum(total_price), 2) AS tier_pollen_spent,
  round(sum(total_price) * (SELECT usd_per_pollen FROM blended_price), 2) AS subsidy_value
FROM generation_event
WHERE start_time >= $__fromTime AND start_time < $__toTime
  AND environment = 'production'
  AND selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:tier', 'local:tier')
  AND is_billed_usage = true
  AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND total_price > 0
  AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users)
  AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Subsidy Over Time

panels.description: Tier pollen spent by tier when tier behavior matters.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (
  SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username
)
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(start_time, INTERVAL 1 DAY) AS time,
  sumIf(total_price, user_tier = 'microbe') AS microbe,
  sumIf(total_price, user_tier = 'spore') AS spore,
  sumIf(total_price, user_tier = 'seed') AS seed,
  sumIf(total_price, user_tier = 'flower') AS flower,
  sumIf(total_price, user_tier = 'nectar') AS nectar
FROM generation_event
WHERE start_time >= $__fromTime AND start_time < $__toTime
  AND environment = 'production'
  AND selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:tier', 'local:tier')
  AND is_billed_usage = true
  AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND total_price > 0
  AND user_tier IN ('microbe', 'spore', 'seed', 'flower', 'nectar')
  AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users)
  AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Tier Spend

panels.description: Tier pollen spent by tier, valued at selected-period blended sale price. Directional, not realized emission.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (
  SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username
),
purchases AS (
  SELECT
    sum(usd_collected) AS usd_collected,
    sum(pollen_issued) AS paid_pollen_issued
  FROM (
    SELECT
      amount_cents / 100.0 AS usd_collected,
      if(
        metadata_pollen > 0,
        metadata_pollen,
        multiIf(pack_usd = 2, 2, pack_usd = 5, 6, pack_usd = 10, 13, pack_usd = 20, 28, pack_usd = 50, 75, pack_usd = 100, 160, amount_cents / 100.0)
      ) AS pollen_issued
    FROM (
      SELECT
        amount_cents,
        toInt32OrZero(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'metadata', 'packAmount')) AS pack_usd,
        toFloat64OrZero(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'metadata', 'packPollenGrant')) AS metadata_pollen
      FROM stripe_event
      WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp < $__toTime
        AND event_type IN ('checkout.session.completed', 'checkout.session.async_payment_succeeded')
        AND payment_status = 'paid'
        AND livemode = 1
    )
  )
),
blended_price AS (
  SELECT if(paid_pollen_issued > 0, usd_collected / paid_pollen_issued, 0) AS usd_per_pollen
  FROM purchases
)
SELECT
  tier,
  round(tier_pollen_spent, 2) AS tier_pollen_spent,
  round(tier_pollen_spent * (SELECT usd_per_pollen FROM blended_price), 2) AS subsidy_value,
  users,
  requests
FROM (
  SELECT
    user_tier AS tier,
    sum(total_price) AS tier_pollen_spent,
    uniq(user_github_id) AS users,
    count() AS requests
  FROM generation_event
  WHERE start_time >= $__fromTime AND start_time < $__toTime
    AND environment = 'production'
    AND selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:tier', 'local:tier')
    AND is_billed_usage = true
    AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
    AND total_price > 0
    AND user_tier IN ('microbe', 'spore', 'seed', 'flower', 'nectar')
    AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users)
    AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))
  GROUP BY user_tier
)
ORDER BY subsidy_value DESC

panels.title: Tier Subsidy

panels.description: Purchase mix by pack size, including bonus pollen and effective price.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  pack,
  purchases,
  usd_collected,
  paid_pollen_issued,
  bonus_pollen,
  if(base_pollen > 0, bonus_pollen / base_pollen, 0) AS bonus_pct,
  effective_usd_per_pollen
FROM (
  SELECT
    pack_usd,
    concat('$', toString(pack_usd)) AS pack,
    count() AS purchases,
    round(sum(amount_cents) / 100.0, 2) AS usd_collected,
    round(sum(pollen_issued), 2) AS paid_pollen_issued,
    round(sum(base_pollen), 2) AS base_pollen,
    round(sum(bonus_pollen), 2) AS bonus_pollen,
    round(if(sum(pollen_issued) > 0, sum(amount_cents) / 100.0 / sum(pollen_issued), 0), 4) AS effective_usd_per_pollen
  FROM (
    SELECT
      amount_cents,
      if(pack_usd_from_metadata > 0, pack_usd_from_metadata, toInt32(round(amount_cents / 100.0))) AS pack_usd,
      if(
        metadata_pollen > 0,
        metadata_pollen,
        multiIf(pack_usd = 2, 2, pack_usd = 5, 6, pack_usd = 10, 13, pack_usd = 20, 28, pack_usd = 50, 75, pack_usd = 100, 160, amount_cents / 100.0)
      ) AS pollen_issued,
      toFloat64(pack_usd) AS base_pollen,
      greatest(pollen_issued - base_pollen, 0) AS bonus_pollen
    FROM (
      SELECT
        amount_cents,
        toInt32OrZero(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'metadata', 'packAmount')) AS pack_usd_from_metadata,
        toFloat64OrZero(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'metadata', 'packPollenGrant')) AS metadata_pollen
      FROM stripe_event
      WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp < $__toTime
        AND event_type IN ('checkout.session.completed', 'checkout.session.async_payment_succeeded')
        AND payment_status = 'paid'
        AND livemode = 1
    )
  )
  GROUP BY pack_usd
)
ORDER BY pack_usd

panels.title: Pack Mix

panels.description: Period blended estimate only: not FIFO/cohort accounting, and assumes selected-period spend has selected-period blended sale price.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (
  SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username
),
purchases AS (
  SELECT
    sum(usd_collected) AS usd_collected,
    sum(pollen_issued) AS paid_pollen_issued,
    sum(bonus_pollen) AS bonus_pollen
  FROM (
    SELECT
      amount_cents / 100.0 AS usd_collected,
      if(
        metadata_pollen > 0,
        metadata_pollen,
        multiIf(pack_usd = 2, 2, pack_usd = 5, 6, pack_usd = 10, 13, pack_usd = 20, 28, pack_usd = 50, 75, pack_usd = 100, 160, amount_cents / 100.0)
      ) AS pollen_issued,
      greatest(pollen_issued - if(pack_usd > 0, pack_usd, amount_cents / 100.0), 0) AS bonus_pollen
    FROM (
      SELECT
        amount_cents,
        toInt32OrZero(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'metadata', 'packAmount')) AS pack_usd,
        toFloat64OrZero(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'metadata', 'packPollenGrant')) AS metadata_pollen
      FROM stripe_event
      WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp < $__toTime
        AND event_type IN ('checkout.session.completed', 'checkout.session.async_payment_succeeded')
        AND payment_status = 'paid'
        AND livemode = 1
    )
  )
),
spend AS (
  SELECT
    sumIf(total_price, selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:pack', 'local:pack')) AS paid_pollen_spent,
    sumIf(total_price, selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:tier', 'local:tier')) AS tier_pollen_spent
  FROM generation_event
  WHERE start_time >= $__fromTime AND start_time < $__toTime
    AND environment = 'production'
    AND selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:pack', 'local:pack', 'v1:meter:tier', 'local:tier')
    AND is_billed_usage = true
    AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
    AND total_price > 0
    AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users)
    AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))
)
SELECT
  round(usd_collected, 2) AS usd_collected,
  round(paid_pollen_issued, 2) AS paid_pollen_issued,
  round(bonus_pollen, 2) AS bonus_pollen,
  round(if(paid_pollen_issued > 0, usd_collected / paid_pollen_issued, 0), 4) AS effective_usd_per_pollen,
  round(paid_pollen_spent, 2) AS paid_pollen_spent,
  round(paid_pollen_spent * if(paid_pollen_issued > 0, usd_collected / paid_pollen_issued, 0), 2) AS estimated_paid_burn_usd,
  if(paid_pollen_issued > 0, paid_pollen_spent / paid_pollen_issued, 0) AS paid_burn_ratio,
  round(tier_pollen_spent, 2) AS tier_pollen_spent
FROM purchases, spend

panels.title: Blended Burn Estimate

panels.description: Tier pollen spent valued at selected-period blended sale price. Directional, not FIFO.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (
  SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username
),
purchases AS (
  SELECT
    sum(usd_collected) AS usd_collected,
    sum(pollen_issued) AS paid_pollen_issued
  FROM (
    SELECT
      amount_cents / 100.0 AS usd_collected,
      if(
        metadata_pollen > 0,
        metadata_pollen,
        multiIf(pack_usd = 2, 2, pack_usd = 5, 6, pack_usd = 10, 13, pack_usd = 20, 28, pack_usd = 50, 75, pack_usd = 100, 160, amount_cents / 100.0)
      ) AS pollen_issued
    FROM (
      SELECT
        amount_cents,
        toInt32OrZero(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'metadata', 'packAmount')) AS pack_usd,
        toFloat64OrZero(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'metadata', 'packPollenGrant')) AS metadata_pollen
      FROM stripe_event
      WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp < $__toTime
        AND event_type IN ('checkout.session.completed', 'checkout.session.async_payment_succeeded')
        AND payment_status = 'paid'
        AND livemode = 1
    )
  )
),
tier_spend AS (
  SELECT sum(total_price) AS tier_pollen_spent
  FROM generation_event
  WHERE start_time >= $__fromTime AND start_time < $__toTime
    AND environment = 'production'
    AND selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:tier', 'local:tier')
    AND is_billed_usage = true
    AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
    AND total_price > 0
    AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users)
    AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))
)
SELECT
  round(tier_pollen_spent * if(paid_pollen_issued > 0, usd_collected / paid_pollen_issued, 0), 2) AS subsidy_value
FROM purchases, tier_spend

panels.title: Subsidy Value

panels.description: Current unspent tier pollen from the latest D1 snapshot.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  round(sum(coalesce(tier_balance, 0)), 2) AS tier_balance
FROM d1_user
WHERE synced_at = (SELECT max(synced_at) FROM d1_user)
  AND banned = 0

panels.title: Tier Balance

panels.description: Outstanding paid pollen balance from daily D1 snapshots.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  day AS time,
  round(sum(paid_balance), 2) AS paid_balance
FROM (
  SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(synced_at, INTERVAL 1 DAY) AS day,
    id,
    argMax(coalesce(pack_balance, 0), synced_at) AS paid_balance,
    argMax(banned, synced_at) AS banned
  FROM d1_user
  WHERE synced_at >= $__fromTime AND synced_at < $__toTime
  GROUP BY day, id
)
WHERE banned = 0
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Paid Liability

panels.description: Daily paid pollen issued by pack size; shows whether larger discounted packs are taking share.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 DAY) AS time,
  concat('$', toString(pack_usd)) AS pack,
  round(sum(pollen_issued), 2) AS paid_pollen_issued
FROM (
  SELECT
    timestamp,
    if(pack_usd_from_metadata > 0, pack_usd_from_metadata, toInt32(round(amount_cents / 100.0))) AS pack_usd,
    if(
      metadata_pollen > 0,
      metadata_pollen,
      multiIf(pack_usd = 2, 2, pack_usd = 5, 6, pack_usd = 10, 13, pack_usd = 20, 28, pack_usd = 50, 75, pack_usd = 100, 160, amount_cents / 100.0)
    ) AS pollen_issued
  FROM (
    SELECT
      timestamp,
      amount_cents,
      toInt32OrZero(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'metadata', 'packAmount')) AS pack_usd_from_metadata,
      toFloat64OrZero(JSONExtractString(payload, 'data', 'object', 'metadata', 'packPollenGrant')) AS metadata_pollen
    FROM stripe_event
    WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp < $__toTime
      AND event_type IN ('checkout.session.completed', 'checkout.session.async_payment_succeeded')
      AND payment_status = 'paid'
      AND livemode = 1
  )
)
GROUP BY time, pack_usd
ORDER BY time, pack_usd

panels.title: Pack Mix Over Time

title: Pollen Flow
